hero.title: Building Africa's next generation of
hero.subtitle: From the heart of Cotonou to the world. We create high-vibrancy, tactile experiences that educate and entertain.

about.title: Our Indie
about.story: Founded in Cotonou, HeyHappy is more than a studio — it's a passion project. We believe that gaming can be a powerful tool for change.
about.story2: By blending modern technology with local storytelling and educational needs, we are crafting digital experiences that resonate with the youth of today and the innovators of tomorrow.
about.founderQuote: "Driven by modern tech and inspired by our realities, we prove every day that from Cotonou, an independent studio can craft world-class experiences that connect communities."

catalogue.title: The HeyHappy
catalogue.subtitle: Tactile games that pop off the screen.

mathscool.name: MathsCool
mathscool.desc: Master arithmetic through epic space missions. Learning has never been this fun.

happygoal.name: HappyGoal
happygoal.desc: The ultimate street soccer experience. Compete in tournaments and upgrade your skills.

smartspend.name: SmartSpend
smartspend.desc: Budgeting made physical. Track your expenses with intuitive bubble-drag interfaces.

autopermis.name: Auto-Permis
autopermis.desc: Ace the driving theory test with our gamified quizzes and interactive traffic scenarios.

collabo.name: Collabo
collabo.desc: Social network for couples and families with interactive long-distance games, chat and shared gallery.

komiko.name: Komiko
komiko.desc: A jokes social network. Share, discover and laugh with your entire community.

modal.error: An error occurred. Please try again.

reviews.empty: Be the first to leave a review!

support.title: Help us grow to
support.subtitle: Every contribution helps us cover server costs, buy dev licenses, and bring our games to the App Store & Play Store.
support.secure: Secure local payments via Mobile Money or Card.
support.thankYou: Thank you so much for your support! Your contribution helps us tremendously in developing new African experiences.

joinUs.title: Join
joinUs.subtitle: Are you a developer, designer or do you have skills that could enrich HeyHappy? We'd love to meet you.
